summary: Recorded the successful 2026-03-26 production live apply of the repo-managed SearXNG runtime on docker-runtime-lv3, the Proxmox-host Tailscale operator proxy, the Open WebUI web-search integration, and the final tailnet DNS publication for search.example.com after a brownout-delayed localhost DNS retry completed successfully.

verification.check: Repo-managed guest runtime and Open WebUI converge
verification.observed: The 2026-03-26 `make converge-searxng` run completed the guest runtime and Open WebUI portions successfully with `docker-runtime-lv3 : ok=118 changed=9 failed=0` and verified the local SearXNG JSON API before the localhost DNS step encountered a Hetzner brownout.

verification.check: Internal and host-proxy SearXNG JSON endpoints
verification.observed: `http://10.10.10.20:8881/search?q=proxmox%20ve&format=json` and `http://100.64.0.1/search?q=proxmox%20ve&format=json` both returned `200` with JSON results on 2026-03-26 after the managed limiter configuration and forced recreate path were applied.

After Hetzner's legacy DNS write API returned `503 Temporary Shutdown (Brownout)` at `12:53 UTC`, a localhost-only rerun at `13:01 UTC` using `ansible-playbook -i inventory/hosts.yml -i localhost, playbooks/searxng.yml --limit localhost` completed with `localhost : ok=11 changed=1 failed=0` and created the `search A 100.64.0.1` record.

verification.check: Tailnet DNS resolution and hostname-backed JSON endpoint
verification.observed: `dig +short @1.1.1.1 search.example.com` returned `100.64.0.1`, and `curl -fsS 'http://search.example.com/search?q=proxmox%20ve&format=json'` returned a structured JSON payload with search results.

notes: The first live rollout on 2026-03-25 was blocked by temporary loss of host reachability and the missing controller-side Hetzner DNS token.

The successful 2026-03-26 completion required two runtime corrections already committed in the workstream: passlisting private and tailnet ranges in `limiter.toml`, and forcing a SearXNG container recreate when managed config files change.

ADR 0148 is live on the platform from the workstream branch, but `Implemented In Repo Version` and `Implemented In Platform Version` remain unset in the ADR metadata until the change is merged through `main`.
